_summary: Phase 2 Visibility EXIT — Idle Suspension live (admin paused after 60s idle, resume on input) + governance contract met. All cooperative, money-flow IMMUTABLE.

implementation.idle: src/packages/runtime/runtime.idle.ts — installIdleSuspension(): 60s no-input → pauseCategory('admin'); any input → resumeCategory('admin'); 5s poll; visibilitychange→visible counts as activity
implementation.governor_check: src/lib/util/visible-interval.ts tick() honors both hidden-tab (PR-G) and idle (PR-H) pauses via isCategoryPaused(cat)

exit_thresholds.raw_breakdown: 12 money-flow FREEZE + 1 rpc.surface DEV collector + 1 PR-F idle-detector + 1 PR-H idle-tick (none in business logic)

pr_history.H: installIdleSuspension() — pauseCategory('admin') after 60s idle + EXIT AUDIT

scenario_for_verification: Run __phonaraSurface.report() after [active 5m → hidden 5m → idle 5m] in DEV. Compare against reports/rpc.surface.2026-05-21.json baseline. Targets: hidden RPC -90%, idle RPC -70%, foreground unchanged.
guarantees_met: No hidden execution (cosmetic paused while hidden)
No uncontrolled interval execution (cooperative governor on all tracked sites)
Full runtime observability through ledger only
